testsuite.name: Storage Layer Integration

testcase.name: should track operations and cleanup correctly
should fail recovery when too many shards are lost
should perform full async ingest and retrieve cycle with progress
should recover from partial shard loss using erasure coding

testsuite.system-out: On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: 77c04748f497fec13d00fc32a26be60f78848d208e09496340ada3098d33f1e3 On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: 7281ef098f9867972d782f610e56305e27e9f3b7bec7d874de405973e85b475c
